shadow_runtime_harness_status.one_line_summary: No short-window PAPER/SHADOW harness report is loaded.
shadow_runtime_harness_status.next_operator_action: Run the non-live PAPER/SHADOW harness before treating runtime evidence as checked.

shadow_persistent_runtime_status.title: PAPER / SHADOW Persistent Runtime
shadow_persistent_runtime_status.one_line_summary: No persistent PAPER/SHADOW runtime stub report is loaded.
shadow_persistent_runtime_status.next_operator_action: Run the bounded non-live persistent runtime stub; do not treat missing runtime evidence as live review evidence.

paper_runtime_recovery_guard_status.title: PAPER Runtime Recovery Guard
paper_runtime_recovery_guard_status.one_line_summary: PAPER runtime recovery guard is clean: latest cycle is recoverable, canonical JSONL is checked, and no orphan temp files are present.
paper_runtime_recovery_guard_status.next_operator_action: Continue PAPER monitoring. This recovery check is not LIVE_READY, not promotion evidence, and not long-run evidence.

runtime_evidence_boundary.title: Runtime Evidence Boundary
runtime_evidence_boundary.one_line_summary: Runtime evidence is stale. Refresh PAPER sources before trusting the dashboard.
runtime_evidence_boundary.stub_boundary_message: No validated persistent runtime source is loaded for long-run evidence.
runtime_evidence_boundary.evidence_requirement_summary: 0/8 long-run evidence requirements currently pass for display-only review; LIVE review remains blocked.

evidence_requirements.label: Persistent runtime source
evidence_requirements.detail: Loads the persistent runtime source as stub-only evidence; it never becomes actual long-run proof.
evidence_requirements.next_operator_action: Generate or refresh the bounded non-live persistent runtime report.

evidence_requirements.label: Short-window harness source
evidence_requirements.detail: Confirms the short-window PAPER/SHADOW harness ran; it is not long-run or LIVE_READY evidence.
evidence_requirements.next_operator_action: Run the non-live PAPER/SHADOW harness and keep live review blocked.

evidence_requirements.label: Runtime source pairing
evidence_requirements.detail: Verifies stub and harness source hashes are paired; it still blocks long-run promotion.
evidence_requirements.next_operator_action: Generate the runtime orchestration guard after both non-live sources exist.

evidence_requirements.label: Actual runtime duration
evidence_requirements.detail: Requires at least 86400s observed PAPER/SHADOW duration, not stub estimates.
evidence_requirements.next_operator_action: Keep PAPER/SHADOW running until enough validated duration is accumulated.

evidence_requirements.label: Actual cycle count
evidence_requirements.detail: Requires at least 2880 validated stable runtime samples from persistent PAPER/SHADOW evidence, not display-history samples or requested-cycle configuration.
evidence_requirements.next_operator_action: Collect observed PAPER/SHADOW cycles through the persistent runtime evidence path before review.

evidence_requirements.label: Evidence windows
evidence_requirements.detail: Requires validated evidence windows over time; single startup checks are not enough.
evidence_requirements.next_operator_action: Continue PAPER monitoring until multiple stable evidence windows exist.

evidence_requirements.label: Heartbeat freshness
evidence_requirements.detail: Shows current heartbeat freshness and whether history is usable for operator review.
evidence_requirements.next_operator_action: Keep heartbeat fresh and append stability history during PAPER monitoring.

evidence_requirements.label: Recovery and partial-write clean
evidence_requirements.detail: Requires clean long-run recovery signals before any live review evidence claim.
evidence_requirements.next_operator_action: Keep monitoring recovery and partial-write signals through validated runtime history.

runtime_evidence_boundary.next_operator_action: Rerun PAPER or refresh heartbeat before operator review.

shadow_runtime_orchestration_status.next_operator_action: Generate the runtime orchestration guard report before treating PAPER/SHADOW runtime evidence as paired.

steps.label: LIVE Review Blocked
